action_command_undeclared: actions[0]: command 'ghost' is not a declared command

action_link_url_empty: actions[0]: 'url' must be a non-empty string
action_param_pattern_redos: actions[0] param 'level': pattern: regex '(a+)+$' has a nested quantifier; this can cause catastrophic backtracking against hostile input
action_setup_kind_in_yaml: actions[0]: kind 'setup' requires a Python driver (a run_setup_action handler); YAML drivers support kind 'command' only

action_visible_when_any_empty: actions[0]: visible_when.any must be a non-empty list
action_visible_when_missing_key: actions[0]: visible_when: condition missing 'key' (state key string)

auth_wrong_transport: auth: login handshake is only supported on tcp/serial transports, not 'udp'
child_id_format_min_greater_than_max: child_entity_types.zone.id_format: min (8) is greater than max (1)

child_set_id_map_bad_pairs: Response 0: child_set[0]: id map entries must be scalar wire id -> local id pairs

child_set_id_ref_exceeds: Response 0: child_set[0]: id: capture ref $9 exceeds the pattern's 2 group(s)
child_set_id_ref_not_numeric: Response 0: child_set[0]: id: '$x' is not a numeric capture ref ($1, $2, ...)

child_set_missing_state: Response 0: child_set[0]: missing 'state' mapping (prop -> $N or literal)
child_set_not_list: Response 0: child_set must be a non-empty list

child_set_state_ref_exceeds: Response 0: child_set[0]: state 'level': capture ref $9 exceeds the pattern's 2 group(s)

child_state_variable_bad_cloud_priority: child_entity_types.zone.state_variables.level: cloud_priority must be 'low' or 'high' (got 'urgent'); omit it for the default cadence
child_state_variable_control_not_bool: child_entity_types.zone.state_variables.level: control must be true or false (got 'yes')

child_type_name_with_dot: child_entity_types: type name 'zone.a' must not contain dots (used as state key separator)
